articles.title: 'Dialling in on clear plans' the key to massive Hope-Greaves stand
articles.description: "He's shown that he's capable of scoring runs in all conditions against all bowling line-ups," Shai Hope said of Justin Greaves after the two added 242

articles.title: Sri Lanka try to make a play after Greaves 180 and Hope 112
articles.description: Sri Lanka reached 92 for 2 at stumps, extending their lead to 142 going into the final day

articles.title: Potts holds nerve to seal Derbyshire tie and dent Lancashire hopes
articles.description: Matty Hurst hits back-to-back fours with nine needed off three but is yorked by final ball

articles.title: Falconer, Minto seal series win for England Under-19s

articles.title: Nyamhuri and Ngarava stun Bangladesh by defending 141
articles.description: Nahid Rana's 6 for 21, the best figures by a Bangladeshi in ODIs, went in vain

articles.title: Babar: 'My main focus is on discipline, fitness, and performance'
articles.description: "It is important to understand where and why we have been struggling in Tests," he says on taking over in his second stint as Test captain

articles.title: New-look India in unfamiliar T20I rut
articles.description: England have issues of their own to sort after Ben Stokes' retirement, but they lead this series 1-0

articles.title: Hampshire secure double signing to lead post-Vince and Dawson rebuild
articles.description: Rishi Patel and Fynn Hudson-Prentice to join from Leicestershire and Sussex respectively

articles.title: Comparing MS Dhoni's captaincy record with Ganguly, Kohli and Rohit
articles.description: MS Dhoni is the only men's captain to lift three major ICC trophies.

articles.title: Aakash Chopra picks India's playing XI for ENG vs IND 2026 3rd T20I, suggests one change
articles.description: Aakash Chopra opined that spinners have fared better than pacers at Trent Bridge, the venue for the third T20I between India and England. However, he urged the team management to drop Ravi Bishnoi.

articles.title: Sanju Samson rested, not dropped, for Zimbabwe T20Is; selectors to test younger players
articles.description: Samson is not the only senior player to be rested. The selectors have also given a break to Axar Patel, Harshit Rana, Washington Sundar, and Arshdeep Singh.

articles.title: 'Vaibhav Sooryavanshi was ready to debut from the time he joined Indian team' - Batting coach Sitanshu Kotak ahead of 3rd T20I vs England
articles.description: India's batting coach Sitanshu Kotak asserted that Vaibhav Sooryavanshi was ready to make his debut from the time he joined the national team ahead of the T20I series against Ireland.

articles.title: ‘What’s the guarantee that Vaibhav Sooryavanshi would keep doing well?’ - Aakash Chopra questions Sanju Samson’s Zimbabwe T20I exclusion
articles.description: Samson amassed 321 runs and won the T20 World Cup Player of the Tournament award, only to be dropped after three poor innings against England.

articles.title: ‘I feel a whole lot of gratitude’ - Sophie Molineux reflects on Australia’s clinical World Cup triumph
articles.description: Australia Women won by seven wickets.

articles.title: 'I have learned from my past experience' - Babar Azam reacts after being renamed Pakistan Test captain
articles.description: The announcement came ahead of the Men in Green's away series against the West Indies, commencing on July 25.

articles.title: T20 Blast 2026: Nottinghamshire sign Sri Lanka's Binura Fernando as Mohammad Ali's replacement
articles.description: Fernando will be available to represent the Notts Outlaws for the entirety of the remaining T20 Blast campaign.
